description: Mixed-variable optimization of nano-carbon type and content in Nd-BaM composites for broadband microwave absorption (2-18 GHz)
notes: Mixed-variable optimization: discrete carbon_type (CNTs/GO/OLC) + continuous carbon_content and thickness. EAB < 3.0 GHz => infeasible. RL normalization range set to 130 dB to accommodate the extreme -123 dB result from CNTs at 8%.
